structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-24 - New Investor: Onslow Bay Financial LLC
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-24 08:46:24-07:00


ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY
 
As demand for flexible lending solutions continues to grow, Capital Markets is pleased to welcome another strong addition to our Non-QM Correspondent lineup: Onslow Bay Financial LLC. Onslow Bay offers a competitive range of Non-QM programs, highlighted by their Expanded Prime Plus and DSCR Plus products.  Their programs will serve credit-worthy borrowers who fall just outside traditional agency guidelines.  Along with these products, Onslow Bay offers strong pricing on Agency Second Home and Non-Owner-Occupied loans.
 
Channel: Banked – Delegated
Product Type: Non-QM, Agency NOO and SH
 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EqlwbDgrs79DjJ1pNrKgkT4BQStpsttSma4d38C-ow-8nA?e=QeACFQ> 
 Marketing Materials <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ej1KL8vdixVMm9wpAs5TykoBuIk5di3kZ9gaISyvVjtaJw?e=atgZsa> 
   
PROGRAM HIGHLIGHTS
 
*	Agency NOO and Second Home
	*	80% Max CLTV, 660+ FICO, 50% DTI
	*	DU Approve/Eligible or LP Accept/Eligible
*	Non-QM:
